findings.message: Page has 2 <h1> tags (expected 1).
findings.fix: Keep a single <h1> per page; demote the extra ones to <h2>/<h3> for a clear heading hierarchy.

findings.message: Title is 19 chars (target 30-60): 'DMCA | TotalSportek'.
findings.fix: Rewrite the <title> to ~30-60 characters so it isn't truncated in search results and still leads with the target keyword.

findings.message: Meta description is 64 chars (target 120-160).
findings.fix: Trim or expand the meta description to ~120-160 characters so it displays fully in the SERP snippet.

findings.message: Page has no rel=canonical link.
findings.fix: Add a self-referencing <link rel="canonical"> so Google consolidates signals on the preferred URL.
